more.title: Fidelity forced to buy specialised machines as suspected Chinese miners flood market with tungsten infused gold
more.description: GOVERNMENT owned Fidelity Refineries and Printers (FRP) has been forced to purchase specialised machinery to analyse large amounts of gold being delivered after revelations that some named Chinese miners were mixing tungsten and gold to increase purity and weight of their product. The post Fidelity forced to buy specialised machines as suspected Chinese miners flood market with tungsten infused gold appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com .

more.title: Kuimba Shiri claims US$86,000 in damages due to Lake Chivero pollution as court knocks out Harare council, ZINWA defence
more.description: Kuimba Shiri (Private) Limited is claiming US$86,240 in damages against the City of Harare, Environmental Management Agency (EMA), Zimbabwe National Water Authority and the Zimbabwe Parks and Wildlife Management Authority after pollution at Lake Chivero devastated its business. more.title: Woman arrested for child brutality after forcing minor to touch burning gas stove in viral video
more.description: POLICE have arrested a Harare woman captured in a viral video while torturing her son for allegedly stealing from a local tuck shop. more.title: RBZ shelves plans to withhold 10% forex earnings from Small Scale Miners
more.description: THE Reserve Bank of Zimbabwe (RBZ) has temporarily halted earlier plans to withhold 10% foreign currency from small scale gold miners. The policy directive was initially tabled in the 2026 Monetary Policy Statement as a strategy to accord policy fairness in the mining sector.
